visual_description: A tight, close-up shot focuses on the face of a man, likely of East Asian descent. His dark hair is disheveled, and his face is sweaty, glistening under dim, cool-toned lighting. His eyes are wide and filled with a look of intense fear, strain, and desperation. The background is dark and out of focus, creating a shallow depth of field that emphasizes the man's distressed expression. In the top left corner of the screen, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in a light blue, stylized font. The camera remains static, holding the close-up to capture the raw emotion on his face. The audio is filled with the raw, strained sounds of a man in extreme distress. He breathes heavily and erratically, as if struggling to catch his breath after a great physical effort or in the middle of a panic. His gasps are sharp and desperate, conveying a sense of fear and exhaustion. There is no background music, making his pained breathing the central and most impactful element of the audio. The overall atmosphere is tense and filled with a palpable sense of anxiety and struggle.
